elements.original_description: A large red button labeled 'BUY NOW' floating in the center of a pure white background, with glowing rays emanating from it to symbolize triggering action.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon, a large red button labeled 'BUY NOW' floating in the exact center of a pure white background, with bright glowing rays emanating outward from the button, clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients, symbolizing triggering action.

elements.original_description: A shopping cart overflowing with branded products like smartphones, shoes, and electronics, placed in the center of a pure white background.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon, a shopping cart overflowing with branded products such as smartphones, athletic shoes, and electronics, placed in the exact center of a pure white background, clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients, sharp and detailed.
